UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D. AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, SHARI WILLIAMS, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WILSON, SHARI WILLIAMS, PATRICK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
#1 BENSON/DOWLING: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. PLTF & DEFTS S WILSON & P WILLIAMS PRESENT IN PRO PER. SETTLED ON RECORD. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, SHARI WILLIAMS, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 S VAN NESS #374, STAYED UNTIL DEC-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 3:00 PM. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS.
